zh.Saint-Maurice-en-Cotentin, Cherbourg, Ma: 法國巴-諾門迪曼其傑爾布格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpas於1041年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin36歲，母親Adela de Vernon45歲。他和Letitia FitzRobert de Malpas至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於從1133年到1140年在英國爾馬爾帕斯。

zh-hans.Saint-Maurice-en-Cotentin, Cherbourg, Ma: 法国巴-諾門迪曼其傑爾布格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpas于1041年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin36岁，母亲Adela de Vernon45岁。他和Letitia FitzRobert de Malpas至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于从1133年到1140年在英国爾馬爾帕斯。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpas was born in 1041, in Cheshire, England, his father, Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin, was 36 and his mother, Adela de Vernon, was 45. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Letitia FitzRobert de Malpas. He died from 1133 to 1140, in Malpas, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpas est né en 1041, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adela de Vernon, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Letitia FitzRobert de Malpas. Il est décédé du 1133 au 1140, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpas 1041 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin 36 und seine Mutter Adela de Vernon 45. Er hatte mit Letitia FitzRobert de Malpas mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb von 1133 bis 1140 in Malpas, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpas è nato il nel 1041 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Adela de Vernon, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Letitia FitzRobert de Malpas. Morì da 1133 a 1140, nel Malpas, Cheshire, England.

ja.Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイア

ja.Malpas, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアマルプアス
ja.lifeSummary: Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpasが1041年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentinは36歳，母Adela de Vernonは45歳であった。彼はLetitia FitzRobert de Malpasとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼はから1133年まで1140年にイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpas(이)가 1041년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Adela de Vernon(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Letitia FitzRobert de Malpas(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1133년 부터 1140년 까지 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpas nasceu em 1041, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Adela de Vernon, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Letitia FitzRobert de Malpas. Ele faleceu de 1133 a 1140, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpas родился в 1041 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adela de Vernon, 45. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Letitia FitzRobert de Malpas. Он умер с 1133 по 1140 в местности малпас, чешир, Англия.

sm.1133-1140: mai le 1133 e o'o I le 1140

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard FitzNigel Baron of Malpas nació en 1041, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Adela de Vernon, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Letitia FitzRobert de Malpas. Murió desde 1133 hasta 1140, en Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
